title: LR-142
author: Psalm 17 (16):15
snippet: As for me, in justice I shall behold your face; I shall be filled with the vision of your glory.

title: Psalm - 15th Sunday of OT
author: Psalm 65: 10, 11, 12-13, 14
snippet: The seed that falls on good ground will yield a fruitful harvest.

title: 15th Sunday Ordinary Time
author: Tom Booth
snippet: The seed is the word of God, Christ is the sower. All who come to him will have life forever.

title: Beautiful Is Your Love
author: Josh Blakesley/Sarah Hart/Marc Byrd
snippet: Oh how beautiful is your love for me. Oh what joy is mine in this mystery. I will not fear the dark, here in the presence of your heart. Oh how beautiful is your love.

title: LR-143
author: Psalm 84 (83)4-5
snippet: The sparrow finds a home, and the swallow a nest for her young. By your altars, O Lord of hosts, my King and my God. Blessed are they who dwell in your house, for ever singing your praise.

title: The Beatitudes
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven. Blessed are those who mourn for they will be comforted. Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth. Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled.

title: Amazed by You
author: Jared Anderson
snippet: You dance over me While I am unaware. You sing all around, But I never hear the sound.

title: Walk in Love
author: Suno/Jim Ngo
snippet: Walk in love, hand in hand, Every heart, every friend. No walls between, no lines to defend, One family, without end.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
